nw_end_conquered_territory_0.title: Lost Land
nw_end_conquered_territory_0.body: Your maps are losing their routes. The flags stay packed away in their crates, and the crew mostly talks about going back.

nw_end_conquered_territory_100.title: Empire on the Map
nw_end_conquered_territory_100.body: The coasts, the forts, the roads, the rivers... everything bears your mark. The New World is your domain... but it is too vast for one person alone, and everything falls apart.

nw_end_found_wealth_0.title: Empty Pockets
nw_end_found_wealth_0.body: The cargo holds echo hollow, and so do the promises. The king expected gold. What you bring back is mostly excuses.

nw_end_found_wealth_100.title: Full Chests
nw_end_found_wealth_100.body: Gold, gems, cargo, rare metals. Every return to port feels like a parade... one that has grown too large. With so much of it around, the value drops, and it all ends up worth almost nothing.

nw_end_converted_population_0.title: Personal Beliefs
nw_end_converted_population_0.body: The people keep their beliefs, their rites, their gods. Your passing leaves marks... but not in their souls.

nw_end_converted_population_100.title: Fanaticism
nw_end_converted_population_100.body: By forcing a single faith for too long, you ended up suffocating everything else. The people grow restless, and the tension becomes impossible to control. You wanted to convert a world. Instead, you pushed it toward collapse.

nw_end_royal_treasury_0.title: The Court Frowns
nw_end_royal_treasury_0.body: The crown is losing faith in you. Support fades away, looks begin to change, and your name slowly loses its place in the circles of power.

nw_end_royal_treasury_100.title: Under Royal Control
nw_end_royal_treasury_100.body: Power rewards you, then traps you inside its expectations. You are no longer an explorer. You have become a tool.
